name: search_properties
description: Find the best-fit Sedona property for a traveler given their desired vibe, budget, dates, and party. Returns a ranked list of matches; the agent presents the single best one. Use this in the Personalized Matching phase to ground a recommendation in real data instead of inventing it.

location.description: Destination or region. For this demo, always 'Sedona, AZ'.

vibe.description: The feel of the trip the guest wants.

budget_per_night.description: Upper bound of the guest's nightly budget in USD.

check_in.description: Desired check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD) or a loose phrase like 'next week'.

check_out.description: Desired check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD) or loose phrase.

returns.description: A ranked match list plus a structured payload that renders a property card and highlights the property in search results. The agent presents matches[0]. Expected shape:

matches.name: Enchantment Resort
matches.why: Wellness-focused luxury inside Boynton Canyon, home to the Mii amo spa; rate sits right in a $250-400 range.
